title: Dacun Heat Wave
lead: A critical heat wave is affecting Dacun with a Z-Score of +3.37. Temperatures are extremely high, reaching a Score of 10.0/10.
body:
The current heat wave in Dacun is causing extremely high temperatures, with a CDD of 10.8 GG. 
 The humidity level is at 73%, and the wind speed is 5.7 km/h, making the heat feel even more intense. 
 The HDD is at 0.0 GG, indicating no heat dissipation, and the situation is critical.
conclusion: Implement immediate heat mitigation measures to ensure public safety.
